name: python3-pyqt6.qtquick
title: python3-pyqt6.qtquick
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Quick module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Quick module
Qt Quick API is the standard library for writing QML applications.
.
This package contains the QtQuick and QtQuickWidgets modules of PyQt6.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtquick with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtquick --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
